title: OpenBlocks Elevator (Fabric)
description: NOW WITH CAMOUFLAGE! This mod adds the famous 1.12.2 Elevator block, fully functional so you can teleport up and down in your world.
body:
# About ** **NOW WITH CAMOUFLAGE AND CONFIG !!!** ** Simple port of the **OpenBlocks Elevator** mod to Fabric This mod adds the famous 1.12.2 Elevator block, fully functional so you can teleport up and down in your world. Right click any block to camouflage the elevator. Crafting is the same. **Config:** To edit the range of blocks you must edit the config manually. Go to your minecraft folder and open up the config folder. Edit the file "openblocksconfig.properties" and change the value 20 for what you want. If you are hosting a server go to your server folder and edit the config file. **Requires Fabric API﻿**
**Made only to fabric** Install this mod both on Client and Server to work Download the most recent version so you don't have any bugs in your game
If you want me to port this mod to a specific version of minecraft just leave a comment :) Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
